source: International Standard Bible Encyclopaedia (James Orr ed., 1915)
html:
bo'-ke-roo (bokheru): A son of Azrikam, Saul's descendant (1Ch 8:38 = 1Ch 9:34). For the ending ("-u"), compare the forms gashmu (Ne 6:1,6) and melikhu (Ne 12:14 the King James Version and the Revised Version, margin).
